CAST(`Type of Request InquiryChange Request` AS string)

properties.scriptMethodHeader: def Script(spark: SparkSession, in0: Dataframe, in1: Dataframe) -> (Dataframe):
properties.script:
from pyspark.sql.functions import col

# Fixed list of input columns to rename
rename_cols = ["Accession # ", "FINAL Status ", "Response Needed By Date", "Missing Samples (Px Codes/LAB ID)", "study_id", "report_run_date", "Requested By", "Priority\n(High, Medium, Low)", "Lab type", "Visit", "Inquiry/Request Description", "Response or Resolution Details", "Inquiry #/Change Request #", "Lab Collection Date in Vendor File", "Subject ID #", "FileName", "Request Date \n(dd-Mmm-yyyy)", "Response Provided By", "Expected/ Response Date \n(dd-Mmm-yyyy)", "Type of Request\n(Inquiry/Change Request)"]

# Collect new names from right input
new_names = [row["C1071007"] for row in in1.select("C1071007").collect()]


# Build rename mapping
rename_map = dict(zip(rename_cols, new_names))

# Build final select expressions (preserve column order)
outputCols = [
    col(c).alias(rename_map[c]) if c in rename_map else col(c)
    for c in in0.columns
]

out0 = in0.select(*outputCols)

expression.expression: CAST((SUBSTRING( report_run_date, 1, ((LEAST((CASE WHEN ((INSTR(report_run_date, '_')) = 0) THEN NULL ELSE (INSTR(report_run_date, '_')) END), (CASE WHEN ((INSTR(report_run_date, ' ')) = 0) THEN NULL ELSE (INSTR(report_run_date, ' ')) END))) - 1))) AS string)

to_date(coalesce(to_timestamp(CAST(`Request Date paranthesesOpendd-Mmm-yyyyparanthesesClose` AS STRING), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS'), to_timestamp(CAST(`Request Date paranthesesOpendd-Mmm-yyyyparanthesesClose` AS STRING), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'), to_timestamp(CAST(`Request Date paranthesesOpendd-Mmm-yyyyparanthesesClose` AS STRING), 'yyyy-MM-dd')))
CAST(`Type of Request paranthesesOpenInquiryslashChange RequestparanthesesClose` AS STRING)
CAST(`Accession hash paranthesesOpenIf ApplicableparanthesesClose` AS STRING)
CAST(`Collection Date in eData paranthesesOpenOptionalparanthesesClose` AS string)
CAST(`Response or Resolution Details` AS string)
CAST(`Priority paranthesesOpenHighcomma Mediumcomma LowparanthesesClose` AS STRING)

(CASE WHEN ((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(report_run_date AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS')) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(report_run_date AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS')) AS DATE) WHEN ((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(report_run_date AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(report_run_date AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')) AS DATE) ELSE CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(report_run_date AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd')) AS DATE) END)
CAST(`Collection Date in CRF paranthesesOpenIf AvailableparanthesesClose` AS STRING)

to_date(coalesce(to_timestamp(CAST(`Response Needed By Date` AS STRING), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS'), to_timestamp(CAST(`Response Needed By Date` AS STRING), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'), to_timestamp(CAST(`Response Needed By Date` AS STRING), 'yyyy-MM-dd')))
CAST(`Inquiry hashslashChange Request hash` AS DOUBLE)

to_date(coalesce(to_timestamp(CAST(`Request Date paranthesesOpendd-Mmm-yyyyparanthesesClose` AS STRING), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS'), to_timestamp(CAST(`Request Date paranthesesOpendd-Mmm-yyyyparanthesesClose` AS STRING), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'), to_timestamp(CAST(`Request Date paranthesesOpendd-Mmm-yyyyparanthesesClose` AS STRING), 'yyyy-MM-dd')))
CAST(`Type of Request paranthesesOpenInquiryslashChange RequestparanthesesClose` AS STRING)
CAST(`Accession hash paranthesesOpenIf ApplicableparanthesesClose` AS STRING)
CAST(`Collection Date in eData paranthesesOpenOptionalparanthesesClose` AS string)
CAST(`Response or Resolution Details` AS string)
CAST(`Priority paranthesesOpenHighcomma Mediumcomma LowparanthesesClose` AS STRING)

(CASE WHEN ((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(report_run_date AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS')) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(report_run_date AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS')) AS DATE) WHEN ((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(report_run_date AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(report_run_date AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')) AS DATE) ELSE CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(report_run_date AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd')) AS DATE) END)
CAST(`Collection Date in CRF paranthesesOpenIf AvailableparanthesesClose` AS STRING)

to_date(coalesce(to_timestamp(CAST(`Response Needed By Date` AS STRING), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS'), to_timestamp(CAST(`Response Needed By Date` AS STRING), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'), to_timestamp(CAST(`Response Needed By Date` AS STRING), 'yyyy-MM-dd')))
CAST(`Inquiry hashslashChange Request hash` AS DOUBLE)

(CASE WHEN ((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(`Expected Response Date` AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS')) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(`Expected Response Date` AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS')) AS DATE) WHEN ((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(`Expected Response Date` AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(`Expected Response Date` AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')) AS DATE) ELSE CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(`Expected Response Date` AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd')) AS DATE) END)

(CASE WHEN ((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(`Request Date` AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS')) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(`Request Date` AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS')) AS DATE) WHEN ((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(`Request Date` AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(`Request Date` AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')) AS DATE) ELSE CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(`Request Date` AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd')) AS DATE) END)
CAST(`Type of Request InquiryChange Request` AS string)
CAST(`Collection Date in eData Optional` AS string)
CAST(`Response or Resolution Details` AS string)
CAST(`Priority High Medium Low` AS string)

(CASE WHEN ((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(reportrundate AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS')) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(reportrundate AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS')) AS DATE) WHEN ((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(reportrundate AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(reportrundate AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')) AS DATE) ELSE CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(reportrundate AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd')) AS DATE) END)

(CASE WHEN ((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(`Response Needed By Date` AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS')) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(`Response Needed By Date` AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS')) AS DATE) WHEN ((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(`Response Needed By Date` AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(`Response Needed By Date` AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')) AS DATE) ELSE CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(`Response Needed By Date` AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd')) AS DATE) END)

properties.scriptMethodHeader: def Script(spark: SparkSession, in0: Dataframe, in1: Dataframe) -> (Dataframe):
properties.script:
from pyspark.sql.functions import col

# Fixed list of input columns to rename
rename_cols = ["Accession # \n(If Applicable)", "Change\nFrom", "Expected Vendor Action", "Site ID ", "Collection Date in eData (Optional)", "study_id", "report_run_date", "Collection Date in CRF\n(If Available)", "Requested By", "Priority\n(High, Medium, Low)", "Status 2", "Visit", "Inquiry/Request Description", "Response or Resolution Details", "Inquiry #/Change Request #", "Subject ID #", "DM Comments", "Additional Identifier\n(e.g., Lab ID, DRP_VQF_Concat Name)", "Data Type ", "Change\nTo", "Response Needed By\nDate", "FileName", "Request Date \n(dd-Mmm-yyyy)", "Response Provided By", "Expected/ Response Date \n(dd-Mmm-yyyy)", "Type of Request\n(Inquiry/Change Request)", "Status "]

# Collect new names from right input
new_names = [row["Name"] for row in in1.select("Name").collect()]


# Build rename mapping
rename_map = dict(zip(rename_cols, new_names))

# Build final select expressions (preserve column order)
outputCols = [
    col(c).alias(rename_map[c]) if c in rename_map else col(c)
    for c in in0.columns
]

out0 = in0.select(*outputCols)
